question.label: Thread follow
question.name: reviews broad, sure — can you say more about what that means for you right now?
question.description: Runtime thread-follow injected because planner did not follow substantive answer.

answer: I would like to grow faster in concept rationale, not just execution speed.

assessment.note: He names a specific growth direction in concept rationale, which is positive for growth but still signals some clarity gap about what development should focus on.

history.answer_excerpt: When reviews are broad, I am not sure what to change first.
I can name wins, but I am not always sure they match the team bar.
Feedback has helped, though I still miss consistency under time pressure.
